## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (tsc strict + production bundle)
- [ ] `npm run test` is green
- [ ] Manually smoke-tested in a real vault if UI-facing
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Followed conventional commits in Portuguese (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
